intro: An optional lock keeps the journal private on this device. It's a gentle deterrent - your data isn't encrypted by the PIN, so anyone who can already reach this device's storage could still read it.
passkeyFailed: Couldn't use the passkey. Try again.
passkeyPrompt: Unlock with your device passkey or biometrics.

recovery.body: You can reset the lock without losing anything. This disables the lock; your journal data stays exactly as it is.
recovery.cloudNote: Signed into an account? Your data is safely in the cloud - you can always sign out and back in.
